name: MCP Registry Search Server (Shawn Durrani)
what_it_does: MCP server for searching the public MCP Registry — enabling AI agents to discover MCP servers, find servers for specific tasks, and copy SSE/HTTP URLs for integration. A meta-tool that makes the MCP ecosystem searchable from within AI agent workflows.
use_cases: Discovering available MCP servers for specific tasks from AI orchestration agents
Finding the right MCP server integration for a new use case from planning agents
Retrieving MCP server connection URLs for dynamic tool loading workflows
Enabling AI agents to self-discover new capabilities from the MCP ecosystem
not_for: Executing or connecting to discovered MCP servers (discovery only)
Private or organizational MCP server registries
Static agent configurations with predefined tool sets
best_when: An AI orchestration agent needs to dynamically discover what MCP servers are available for a given task — searching the official MCP registry to find the right tool without hardcoding integrations.
avoid_when: You have a fixed set of known MCP servers. Meta-discovery adds complexity and is only valuable when the agent needs to reason about its own capabilities dynamically.

auth.notes: Public MCP registry — no auth required for search. The underlying MCP Registry API is publicly accessible.

pricing.notes: Free MCP server wrapping the public MCP Registry API.

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Discovered MCPs may have arbitrary capabilities — validate before connecting
Not all MCP registry entries are quality-vetted — some servers may be malicious or low-quality
Dynamic MCP discovery creates bootstrapping complexity — agents must evaluate discovered servers
SSE/HTTP URLs from registry may require auth not discoverable from registry alone
Meta-MCP introduces circular reasoning risk — agents searching for how to search
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Discovered MCP servers have unknown security posture. Never auto-connect to discovered servers without review. Registry is not curated for security.

security_score_components.security_notes: Discovering untrusted MCP servers. Never auto-execute capabilities from discovered servers. Registry quality varies. HTTPS to official registry.
